n: The Ghostly Roads Go Ever On

steps.t: The ghostly figure can be found near the road south of Eitheldir in the western Angle. You should look for the ghostly figure.
The dirt pile is near the road south of Eitheldir. You should investigate the pile of dirt.
The outcrop is in the south-western Angle. You have defeated a man who was masquerading as a ghost, and found a bag with a tin of white paint. Continu…
The outcrop is in the south-western Angle. You have defeated a Man who was masquerading as a ghost. Search the area of the rocky outcrop he was lurkin…
The path is in the south-western Angle. The brigand was guarding a small path. You should investigate the path.
Waltney and Garan Maythorn are in the south-western Angle. You should let Waltney and Garan know that the brigand pretending to be a ghost has been de…
